english translation text: DASHTE GHURBAT ME NA YUN THOKARE KHAATA PANIIn the land of sorrow, water held no value
DASHTE GHURBAT ME NA YUN THOKARE KHAATA PANIIn the land of sorrow, water held no value
KOWN KEHTA HAI KE PANI KO TARASTE THE HUSSAYNINKE HOTON KO TARASTA RAHA PYASA PANIWho says Hussain was yearning for water, Instead, the water was yearning for the lips of Hussain.
CHU NA PAYA JO LABE ASGHARE MASUM TO PHIRSHARM SE DOOB GAYA NEHR ME PYASA PANIBecause the water didn't touch the lips of Ali Asghar, The water resigned itself into the river with shame.

AGAYA GHAZI KE CHULLU ME UMMAK KAR EKDAMWARNA PYAAS APNI KISSE JAAKE DIKHATA PANISuddenly the water lept into the palms of the flag bearer Abbas, Otherwise whom would the water have shown it's thirst [to be used by the Ahle Haram].
USS PE SAKKA-E SAKINA KA KARAM HOTA HAIJO PILATA HAI AZADARO KO THANDA PANIThe blessings of Sakina's water bearer [H. Abbas] Will be upon those who quench the thirst of the Azadar of Hussain.
